role_summary: the financial analyst provides financial insights, analysis, and forecasts to support  management decision -making.
responsibilities: • analyze financial statements and performance trends   • prepare budgets, forecasts, and variance analysis   • build financial models and scenario analysis   • support strategic planning and investment evaluation   • prepare mis and management reports   • assist in cost control  and profitability analysis
qualifications: • qualified ca   • strong financial analysis and modeling skills   • advanced excel and reporting proficiency
